nodes.name: Böhm's bee-eater
nodes.summary: Böhm's bee-eater（Merops boehmi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Böhm's bee-eater。

nodes.name: Merops
nodes.summary: Merops（Merops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联27种鸟类，如Black-headed bee-eater、Red-throated bee-eater、Somali bee-eater等27种鸟类。

nodes.name: Böhm's bee-eater
nodes.summary: Böhm's bee-eater (Merops boehmi) is a species of bird in the family Meropidae. It is found in Democratic Republic of the Congo, Malawi, Mozambique, Tanzania, and Zambia. The name of this bird commemorates the German zoologist Richard Böhm. References
